import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_num
        let signed = val * sign
        if signed > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      in_num = true
      sign = -1
    else if b == 43
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
    else
      in_num = true
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let signed = val * sign
    if signed > 0
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
